Item Name: Santiam Insulated Vest Gunmetal/Shadow Tan  M
Web Item Name: Santiam Insulated Vest Gunmetal/Shadow Tan  M
Web Item Description: When cool-weather conditions call for core warmth the Santiam Insulated Vest has you covered. It’s as stylish as it is functional and guaranteed to keep you warm without restricting your movement.

Item Name: Santiam Insulated Vest Gunmetal/Shadow Tan L
Web Item Name: Leupold Santiam Insulated Vest Gunmetal Shadow Tan L
Web Item Description:
When cool-weather conditions call for core warmth the Santiam Insulated Vest has you covered. It’s as stylish as it is functional and guaranteed to keep you warm without restricting your movement.

The Santiam Insulated Vest is durable water-resistant and offers the perfect balance between weight and warmth making it perfect for running early morning drills at the range setting up your treestand or hanging trail cameras in preparation for your next big hunt. The 20D ripstop DWR coated fabric protects you from the wind and keeps you dry in a light rain so you stay comfortable when conditions take a turn for the worse. Plus with 60 GMS of lightweight insulation this vest can be worn on its own or as an insulating layer for year-round warmth.

When temperatures drop keep warm and keep moving with the Santiam Insulated Vest whether you’re at the range in the field or out on the town.

Item Name: Leupold Covert Pro Men's 1/4 Zip Black M
Web Item Name: Leupold Covert Pro Men's 1/4 Zip Black M
Web Item Description:
Heavy layers don’t make for subtle movements. Creep up on bulls in the backcountry while wearing the Leupold Covert Pro 1/4 Zip. Its lightweight fabric stretches in all directions allowing you the freedom to bend twist or crouch when you're looking for shooting lanes through dense vegetation.

Item Name: Leupold Gale Force Pro Vest Black XL
Web Item Name: Leupold Gale Force Pro Men's Vest Black XL
Web Item Description:
Add the Gale Force Pro Vest to your pre-outing checklist and be ready for the fronts headed your way.  Softshell 4-way stretch fabric repels wind water mud and blood creating a flexible shield against the turbulence of hunts and matches. Rear drop hem shuts out debris and its athletic cut is perfect for layering. 

4-Way Stretch Fabric

Water-Resistant DWR Coating

Rear Drop Hem

YKK Zippers

Zippered Hand Pockets

Wind-Resistant Softshell
